creator: r.c.ladan@gmail.com
text:
I've made a shar archive for version 0.9.0 of this port available at ftp://rene-ladan.nl/pub/freebsd/fuse-utils-0.9.0.shar
(3291 bytes, MD5 = 5e9cc2cf072ec8d8a03742894db60f9a)

This file is checked with 'portlint -A' and a build/install test.

libgcrypt is now installed by default, so the above issue should be solved.

Rene
-- 
http://www.rene-ladan.nl/

GPG fingerprint = E738 5471 D185 7013 0EE0  4FC8 3C1D 6F83 12E1 84F6 (subkeys.pgp.net)
